selection: 按 4–7 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: n. 一点点, 少许, 一会儿, 短时间；a. 小的, 很少的, 幼小的, 琐碎的, 短暂的, 矮小的
words.definition: n. a small amount or duration

words.translation: n. 例证, 插图
words.definition: n. artwork that helps make something clear or attractive

words.translation: n. 淑女, 夫人, 女士, 贵妇
words.definition: n. a polite name for any woman

words.translation: n. 白色, 洁白, 眼白, 白种人, 蛋白；a. 白色的, 纯洁的, 白种的, 苍白的, 空白的, 幸运的
words.definition: n. the quality or state of the achromatic color of greatest lightness (bearing the least resemblance to black)

words.translation: n. 年长者, 老人, 前辈；a. 年长的, 资深的
words.definition: n. a person who is older than you are

words.translation: n. 花, 开花植物, 精华, 盛时；vi. 开花, 发育, 旺盛, 成熟
words.definition: n. a plant cultivated for its blooms or blossoms

words.translation: n. 跳舞, 舞蹈, 舞会；v. 跳舞
words.definition: n. an artistic form of nonverbal communication

words.translation: n. 书, 书籍, 帐簿, 名册, 工作簿；v. 登记, 预订
words.definition: n. a written work or composition that has been published (printed on pages bound together)

words.translation: n. 爱, 恋爱, 爱情, 爱好, 性爱；vt. 爱, 爱好, 爱慕
words.definition: n. a strong positive emotion of regard and affection

words.translation: n. 玫瑰, 蔷薇, 玫瑰色；a. 玫瑰色的, 玫瑰花的
words.definition: n. any of many shrubs of the genus Rosa that bear roses

words.translation: n. 甜蜜, 糖果, 情人；a. 甜的, 芳香的, 悦耳的, 漂亮的, 和蔼的, 不咸的, 灵活的, 轻快的
words.definition: n. English phonetician; one of the founders of modern phonetics (1845-1912)

words.translation: a. 向前的, 早的, 迅速的, 在前的, 进步的；vt. 促进...的生长, 转寄, 运送
words.definition: a. at or near or directed toward the front

words.translation: n. 希望, 信心, 期待；v. 希望, 期望, 信赖
words.definition: n. a specific instance of feeling hopeful

words.translation: n. 夜, 夜晚, 晚上, 黑暗, 夜晚的工作
words.definition: n. the time after sunset and before sunrise while it is dark outside

words.translation: n. 圣诞节
words.definition: n. period extending from Dec. 24 to Jan. 6

words.translation: num. 千；a. 成千的, 许多的
words.definition: n. the cardinal number that is the product of 10 and 100

words.translation: n. 地球, 泥土, 世界, 尘世；vt. 埋入土中, 赶入洞内
words.definition: n. the 3rd planet from the sun; the planet we live on

words.translation: n. 树, 木料, 树状物；vt. 把...赶上树
words.definition: n. a tall perennial woody plant having a main trunk and branches forming a distinct elevated crown; includes both gymnosperms and angiosperms

words.translation: n. 声音, 嗓音, 嗓子, 愿望, 发言权, 表达, 喉舌, 语态；vt. 表达, 吐露, 调音
words.definition: n. the distinctive quality or pitch or condition of a person's speech

words.translation: n. 故事, 小说, 传奇, 描述, 阅历, 经历, 层
words.definition: n. a piece of fiction that narrates a chain of related events

words.translation: n. 雪, 积雪, 下雪, 雪花形干扰；vi. 下雪, 似雪般落下
words.definition: n. precipitation falling from clouds in the form of ice crystals

words.translation: vt. 叫醒, 激发；vi. 醒来, 醒着, 觉醒, 活跃起来
words.definition: v. be awake, be alert, be there

words.translation: n. 春天, 弹簧, 跳跃, 弹性, 活力, 泉, 源泉；a. 春天的
words.definition: n. the season of growth

words.translation: a. 暖和的, 暖的, 温暖的, 热烈的, 兴奋的, 激烈的, 多情的, 色情的；vt. 使温暖, 弄热, 使兴奋, 使充满仇恨
words.definition: a. having or producing a comfortable and agreeable degree of heat or imparting or maintaining heat

words.translation: n. 木材, 木制品；vt. 植林于, 给...添加木柴
words.definition: n. the hard fibrous lignified substance under the bark of trees

words.translation: vi. 参加, 结合, 加入；vt. 连接, 结合, 参加, 加入
words.definition: v. become part of; become a member of a group or organization

words.translation: n. 早晨, 早上, 初期
words.definition: n. the time period between dawn and noon

words.translation: n. 床, 睡眠处, 河床, 底座, 路基, 一层；vt. 提供宿处, 栽种, 安装
words.definition: n. a piece of furniture that provides a place to sleep

words.translation: a. 明亮的, 聪明的, 鲜明的, 欢快的；adv. 明亮地, 欢快地
words.definition: a. emitting or reflecting light readily or in large amounts

words.translation: n. 感冒, 寒冷；a. 寒冷的, 冷淡的, 冷静的
words.definition: n. a mild viral infection involving the nose and respiratory passages (but not the lungs)

words.translation: n. 头发, 毛发, 些微
words.definition: n. a covering for the body (or parts of it) consisting of a dense growth of threadlike structures (as on the human head); helps to prevent heat loss

words.translation: a. 忧愁的, 悲哀的
words.definition: a. experiencing or showing sorrow or unhappiness

words.translation: adv. 离去
words.definition: r. from a particular thing or place or position (`forth' is obsolete)

words.translation: n. 黑色, 黑颜料；a. 黑色的
words.definition: n. the quality or state of the achromatic color of least lightness (bearing the least resemblance to white)

words.translation: n. 头, 头脑, 领袖, 脑袋, 最前的部分；vt. 为首, 朝向, 前进, 用头顶
words.definition: n. the upper part of the human body or the front part of the body in animals; contains the face and brains

words.translation: n. 小时, 钟头, 时间, ...点钟, 课时
words.definition: n. a period of time equal to 1/24th of a day

words.translation: adv. 一次, 曾经, 一旦；conj. 一旦, 一经
words.definition: r. on one occasion

words.translation: n. 圆, 圆形物, 巡回, 循环, 一轮, 一回合, 一局, 范围, 轮唱；a. 圆的, 球形的, 丰满的, 肥胖的, 完全的, 大概的, 完美的, 圆润的
words.definition: n. a charge of ammunition for a single shot

words.translation: n. 姐妹, 姐, 妹, 护士, 修女；vt. 姐妹般对待
words.definition: n. a female person who has the same parents as another person

words.translation: n. 站立, 站住, 停顿, 讲台, 看台, 立场, 法院证人席；vi. 站, 立, 坐落, 停滞, 位于, 坚持, 维持原状
words.definition: n. the position where a thing or person stands

words.translation: n. 符号, 象征, 代号, 信条
words.definition: n. an arbitrary sign (written or printed) that has acquired a conventional significance

words.translation: prep. 直到, 在...以前, 迄；conj. 直到...为止
words.definition: n. unstratified soil deposited by a glacier; consists of sand and clay and gravel and boulders mixed together

words.translation: n. 黄色；a. 黄色的
words.definition: n. yellow color or pigment; the chromatic color resembling the hue of sunflowers or ripe lemons

words.translation: a. 美丽的
words.definition: a. delighting the senses or exciting intellectual or emotional admiration

words.translation: a. 贫穷的, 贫乏的, 不幸的, 可怜的, 拙劣的, 卑鄙的
words.definition: a. having little money or few possessions

words.translation: vi. 唱, 唱歌, 演唱, 鸣, 啼；vt. 唱, 歌颂
words.definition: v. deliver by singing

words.translation: a. 真实的, 正确的, 忠诚的, 可靠的, 纯粹的, 正式的；n. 真实, 准确
words.definition: a. consistent with fact or reality; not false

words.translation: prep. 在...之上, 迫近, 紧接着
words.definition: prep. On; -- used in all the senses of that word, with which it

words.translation: 太太
words.definition: n. a form of address for a married woman

words.translation: prep. 越过, 穿过, 与...相交叉, 在...的对面；adv. 交叉, 到另一边, 在对面, 成十字
words.definition: r. to the opposite side

words.translation: n. 空气, 旋律, 态度；vt. 晾, 使通风, 夸耀
words.definition: n. a mixture of gases (especially oxygen) required for breathing; the stuff that the wind consists of

words.translation: adv. 平行地, 向前；prep. 沿着
words.definition: r. with a forward motion

words.translation: n. 答案, 回答, 回报, 答辩；vt. 回答, 反驳, 适应, 响应, 符合
words.definition: n. a statement (either spoken or written) that is made to reply to a question or request or criticism or accusation

words.translation: vi. 出现, 显得, 来到
words.definition: v. come into sight or view

words.translation: a. 睡着的, 长眠的, 麻木的；adv. 熟睡地
words.definition: a. in a state of sleep

words.translation: a. 坏的；n. 坏
words.definition: a. having undesirable or negative qualities

words.translation: n. 少量, 马嚼子, 辅币；vt. 给马上嚼子, 控制
words.definition: n. a small fragment of something broken off from the whole

words.translation: n. 褐色；a. 褐色的
words.definition: n. an orange of low brightness and saturation

words.translation: a. 清楚的, 明确的, 澄清的；adv. 清晰地
n. 门
words.definition: n. a swinging or sliding barrier that will close the entrance to a room or building or vehicle

words.translation: a. 早的, 早熟的；adv. 很早, 初
words.definition: a. at or near the beginning of a period of time or course of events or before the usual or expected time

words.translation: n. 落下, 瀑布, 采伐量, 下降, 落差, 降低, 堕落, 秋天；vi. 倒下, 落下, 来临, 失守, 阵亡, 下跌, 减弱, 倾斜, 垮台, 轮到, 变成, 降低
words.definition: n. the season when the leaves fall from the trees

words.translation: n. 打架, 争吵, 斗志；v. 对抗, 打架
words.definition: n. the act of fighting; any contest or struggle

words.translation: n. 朋友, 支持者, 赞助者
words.definition: n. a person you know well and regard with affection and trust

words.translation: n. 绿色, 绿色颜料；a. 绿色的, 未成熟的, 新鲜的, 青春的, 无经验的, 脸色发青的
words.definition: n. green color or pigment; resembling the color of growing grass

words.translation: n. 土地, 战场, 场地, 地面, 范围；a. 土地的, 地面上的
words.definition: n. a position to be won or defended in battle (or as if in battle)

words.translation: n. 历史, 过去, 经历, 发展过程, 历史学, 过去的事, 历史记录
words.definition: n. the aggregate of past events

words.translation: n. 陆地, 地面, 地界, 地产, 国土, 土地；vi. 登陆, 登岸, 到达
words.definition: n. the land on which real estate is located

words.translation: n. 最少, 最小, 最小限度；a. 最少的, 最小的
words.definition: n. something that is of no importance

words.translation: n. 低点, 低价, 低, 牛叫声；a. 低的, 消沉的, 低等的, 浅的, 卑贱的
words.definition: n. an air mass of lower pressure; often brings precipitation

words.translation: n. 中央, 中间, 腰部；a. 中央的, 中庸的, 中间的
words.definition: n. an intermediate part or section

words.translation: n. 母亲, 修女院长；vt. 产生, 照看, 收养
words.definition: n. a woman who has given birth to a child (also used as a term of address to your mother)

words.translation: n. 无, 不关紧要之事, 零；adv. 毫不, 决不
words.definition: n. a quantity of no importance

words.translation: n. 军官, 主管, 官员, 公务员；vt. 指挥
words.definition: n. a person authorized to serve in a position of authority on a vessel

words.translation: n. 公开, 户外, 空旷；a. 开着的, 开放的, 开阔的, 营业着的, 公开的, 悬而未决的
words.definition: n. a clear or unobstructed space or expanse of land or water

words.translation: n. 游戏, 游玩, 玩笑, 运动, 比赛, 赌博, 跳动, 表演, 剧本；v. 玩, 游戏, 假装, 开玩笑, 比赛, 扮演, 演奏, 演戏, 传摇曳, (使)跳动
words.definition: n. a dramatic work intended for performance by actors on a stage

words.translation: n. 房间, 空位, 场所；vi. 住宿, 居住
words.definition: n. an area within a building enclosed by walls and floor and ceiling

words.translation: n. 秒, 瞬间, 第二名, 支持者, 助手；a. 第二的, 其次的, 次要的, 附加的, 辅助的
words.definition: n. 1/60 of a minute; the basic unit of time adopted under the Systeme International d'Unites

words.translation: vi. 坐, 就座, 坐落；vt. 使就座, 骑
words.definition: v. be seated

words.translation: vi. 说, 说话, 演说, 发言；vt. 说, 讲, 说出
words.definition: v. use language

words.translation: adv. 一起, 共同, 彼此
words.definition: r. in contact with each other or in proximity

words.translation: adv. 两次, 两倍
words.definition: r. two times

words.translation: prep. 直到, 在...以前；conj. 直到...时, 在...以前
words.definition: prep. To; unto; towards; -- used of material objects.

words.translation: n. 伤害, 害处；vt. 伤害, 损害
n. 铃, 钟
words.definition: n. a hollow device made of metal that makes a ringing sound when struck

words.translation: n. 呼吸, 气息, 瞬间
words.definition: n. the process of taking in and expelling air during breathing

words.translation: n. 友谊, 友爱, 友善
words.definition: n. the state of being friends (or friendly)

words.translation: n. 欢喜, 乐事, 高兴；vt. 使快乐, 令人高兴
words.definition: n. the emotion of great happiness

words.translation: n. 授予, 授予物, 允许；vt. 允许, 承认, 授与
words.definition: n. any monetary aid

words.translation: num. 十二, 十二个
words.definition: n. the cardinal number that is the sum of eleven and one

words.translation: n. 教堂, 礼拜, 教会；vt. 使人接受宗教仪式
words.definition: n. one of the groups of Christians who have their own beliefs and forms of worship

words.translation: n. 圆周, 社交圈, 循环, 范围；vt. 围着, 环绕
words.definition: n. ellipse in which the two axes are of equal length; a plane curve generated by one point moving at a constant distance from a fixed point

words.translation: n. 狗, 坏蛋；vt. 跟踪, 尾随
words.definition: n. a member of the genus Canis (probably descended from the common wolf) that has been domesticated by man since prehistoric times; occurs in many breeds

words.translation: n. 怀疑, 疑惑；v. 怀疑, 不信
words.definition: n. the state of being unsure of something

words.translation: n. 服装, 覆盖物；vi. 穿着
words.definition: n. a one-piece garment for a woman; has skirt and bodice

words.translation: a. 干的, 无酒的, 枯燥无味的, 干燥的；vt. 把...弄干
words.definition: a. free from liquid or moisture; lacking natural or normal moisture or depleted of water; or no longer wet

words.translation: n. 展览会, 市集, 美好的事物；a. 公平的, 按规则进行的, 不好不坏的, 晴朗的, 美丽的
words.definition: n. gathering of producers to promote business

words.translation: n. 二月
words.definition: n. the month following January and preceding March

words.translation: n. 饲料, 一餐, 饲养；vt. 喂, 饲养, 放牧, 靠...为生
words.definition: n. food for domestic livestock

words.translation: n. 花园, 果园, 菜园；vi. 栽培花木
words.definition: n. a plot of ground where plants are cultivated

words.translation: n. 上帝, 神像, 偶像；vt. 使神化
words.definition: n. the supernatural being conceived as the perfect and omnipotent and omniscient originator and ruler of the universe; the object of worship in monotheistic rel

words.translation: n. 悬挂, 诀窍, 意义；vt. 悬挂, 附着, 装饰, 垂下, 踌躇, 绞死, 使悬而未决
words.definition: n. the way a garment hangs

words.translation: n. 心, 心脏, 中心, 内心, 感情, 精神, 心情, 宝贝儿；vt. 鼓励
words.definition: n. the locus of feelings and intuitions

words.translation: n. 冰, 冰淇淋, 糖衣, 冷若冰霜, 矜持, 贿赂；vt. 使结冰, 冰镇, 覆以糖衣
words.definition: n. water frozen in the solid state

words.translation: n. 知识, 学问, 认识, 知道
vt. 放置, 产, 铺设, 布置, 提出, 平息；vi. 下蛋, 打赌
words.definition: v. put in a horizontal position

words.translation: n. 举起, 帮助, 昂扬, 电梯；vt. 升高, 提高, 鼓舞, 清偿, 空运, 举起, 剽窃
words.definition: n. the act of giving temporary assistance

words.translation: vi. 听, 倾听, 听从；n. 听, 倾听
words.definition: v. hear with intention

words.translation: n. 消息, 通讯, 讯息, 教训, 预言, 广告词；vt. 通知
words.definition: n. a communication (usually brief) that is written or spoken or signaled

words.translation: n. 自然, 大自然, 本性, 性格, 性质
words.definition: n. the essential qualities or characteristics by which something is recognized

words.translation: n. 次序, 规则, 命令；vi. 命令, 定货
words.definition: n. (often plural) a command given by a superior (e.g., a military or law enforcement officer) that must be obeyed

words.translation: vt. 防卫, 保护, 警戒
words.definition: v. shield from danger, injury, destruction, or damage

words.translation: n. 王后, 女王；vt. 立为女王
words.definition: n. the only fertile female in a colony of social insects such as bees and ants and termites; its function is to lay eggs

words.translation: n. 雨, 下雨, 雨天；vi. 下雨
words.definition: n. water falling in drops from vapor condensed in the atmosphere

words.translation: n. 科学, 学科, 学问, 自然科学
words.definition: n. a particular branch of scientific knowledge

words.translation: n. 睡眠, 静止, 昏迷, 麻木, 长眠, 冬眠；vi. 睡觉, 睡眠, 静止
words.definition: n. a natural and periodic state of rest during which consciousness of the world is suspended

words.translation: a. 软的, 温和的, 柔和的, 柔滑的, 温柔的, 软弱的, 坡度小的, 笨的, 纸币的；n. 柔软的东西, 笨人, 纸币
words.definition: a. yielding readily to pressure or weight

words.translation: n. 歌, 曲, 鸣声, 歌唱, 歌曲, 诗歌
words.definition: n. a short musical composition with words

words.translation: n. 标准, 规格, 旗, 军旗, 本位；a. 标准的, 合规格的
words.definition: n. a basis for comparison; a reference point against which other things can be evaluated

words.translation: n. 夏季, 全盛时期；vi. 避暑, 过夏天
words.definition: n. the warmest season of the year; in the northern hemisphere it extends from the summer solstice to the autumnal equinox

words.translation: n. 欢迎, 欢迎词；a. 受欢迎的, 可随意的, 可喜的
words.definition: n. the state of being welcome

words.translation: n. 风, 气息, 气味, 呼吸, 风声, 趋势, 空谈, 卷绕, 弯曲；vt. 使通风, 嗅出, 使喘气, 吹号角, 上发条, 缠绕, 包, 绞起, 吊起, 使弯曲, 使迂回
words.definition: n. air moving (sometimes with considerable force) from an area of high pressure to an area of low pressure

words.translation: n. 希望, 愿望, 祝愿, 命令, 请求；vt. 愿, 想要, 希望, 祝愿
words.definition: n. a specific feeling of desire

words.translation: n. 较少, 较小；a. 少的, 小的
n. 压, 揿, 按, 人群, 印刷机, 压力, 出版社, 记者, 报刊, 新闻舆论, 紧迫；vt. 压, 压榨, 紧抱, 逼迫, 推进, 强迫征募, 催逼
words.definition: n. the print media responsible for gathering and publishing news in the form of newspapers or magazines

words.translation: n. 安全, 安全性, 防护物, 保安, 可靠性, 担保人, 抵押品, 保证金
words.definition: n. the state of being free from danger or injury

words.translation: a. 长的, 长久的, 冗长的, 做多头的；vi. 渴望, 热望, 极想
words.definition: a. primarily temporal sense; being or indicating a relatively great or greater than average duration or passage of time or a duration as specified

words.translation: n. 舒适, 安慰, 安慰者；vt. 安慰
